description.zh: 深圳湾沿岸13公里海滨长廊，是深圳最受欢迎的公园之一。
description.en: 13km coastal park along Shenzhen Bay, one of Shenzhen's most popular parks.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 位于深圳湾公园 C2 区（望海路旁），三面环山、面向大海的弧形临海草坪。地铁2号线至湾厦站转公交可达「日出剧场」站，视野开阔无遮挡。冬天云少最出片，夏天建议提前查天气预报。
tip.en: 📍 Zone C2 of Shenzhen Bay Park (Wanghai Rd). Crescent-shaped seaside lawn surrounded by hills on three sides.

tip.zh: 📍 深圳湾公园 C 区运动公园段，面向西南方向的海滨栈道。退潮时滩涂倒映落日，可同时拍到深圳湾大桥和远处香港群山。
tip.en: 📍 Sports Park section, Zone C, facing SW. Low tide reflections with Bay Bridge + HK hills.

tip.zh: 📍 从红树林海滨生态公园出发沿深圳湾北侧向东到大桥。全长 13km 专用绿道，全程平坦无坡度，适合各类车型。
tip.en: 📍 From Mangrove Eco Park eastward to Bay Bridge. ~13km dedicated flat greenway.

tip.zh: 📍 沿海滨栈道的塑胶跑道，从日出剧场到运动公园段约 3km。面朝大海奔跑，空气清新，是深圳跑友最爱的路线之一。
tip.en: 📍 Rubber track along the seaside promenade. ~3km from Sunrise Theater to Sports Park. Sea breeze all the way.

tip.zh: 📍 靠近红树林生态展厅的儿童游乐区域，有沙池、滑梯和攀爬设施。周末人多，建议工作日上午前往。
tip.en: 📍 Near Eco Exhibition Hall with sandbox, slides, and climbing structures.

tip.zh: 📍 运动公园附近地下停车场，车位较紧张，周末建议早到或使用公共交通。
tip.en: 📍 Underground parking near Sports Park. Limited spaces on weekends.

description.zh: 深圳湾河口的保护性滨海湿地，栖息着珍稀红树林和候鸟。
description.en: Protected coastal wetland at the mouth of Shenzhen Bay, home to rare mangroves and migratory birds.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 红树林保护区核心区，从生态展厅旁进入木栈道。日出鸟群最活跃，11月-3月候鸟季可看黑脸琵鹭。需在深圳湾公园公众号预约。
tip.en: 📍 Core reserve area from Eco Exhibition Hall. Dawn bird activity peak, Nov-Mar migration season.

tip.zh: 📍 栈道最西端靠近深圳河口。退潮时滩涂露出，弹涂鱼和招潮蟹在夕阳下非常有趣。注意查潮汐表。
tip.en: 📍 Westernmost end near river mouth. Low tide mudflat wildlife at sunset.

tip.zh: 📍 穿越红树林保护区的木栈道步道，全程约 2km 平坦路面。清晨空气最佳，可边跑边观鸟。
tip.en: ~2km flat boardwalk through mangrove forest. Best air quality at dawn, birdsong along the way.

tip.zh: 📍 生态展厅一楼洗手间，设施较新。
tip.en: 📍 First floor of Eco Exhibition Hall.

description.zh: 南山区主要山地公园，有登山步道、古迹遗址，可俯瞰深圳和香港全景。
description.en: The main mountain park in Nanshan with hiking trails, ancient sites, and panoramic views.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 公园最高点，标志性建筑「南山明灯」所在。从北山道登山口上山约 40 分钟，可同时看深圳湾大桥、香港群山和福田 CBD 天际线。冬季清晨常有云海。
tip.en: 📍 Highest point with iconic 'Nanshan Beacon'. ~40min from Beishan Rd. Bay Bridge + HK + Futian views.

tip.zh: 📍 山腰处「齐天亭」，面向前海和蛇口方向。不需登顶就能看到的日落机位，约登山 25 分钟。正对前海湾方向，夏天光晕特别壮观。
tip.en: 📍 Mid-mountain Qitian Pavilion facing Qianhai & Shekou. ~25min no summit needed.

tip.zh: 📍 南山公园主环线步道，全程约 5km，累计爬升约 280m。山路台阶为主，适合有经验的跑者。清晨人少景美。
tip.en: 📍 Main loop trail ~5km, 280m elevation gain. Stair-heavy mountain path for experienced runners.

tip.zh: 📍 北山道登山口旁露天停车场，免费但车位有限，建议早上 7 点前到达。
tip.en: 📍 Free open lot near Beishan Rd trailhead. Limited spots, arrive before 7 AM.

tip.zh: 📍 山顶观景台附近公厕，设施简陋但可用。建议下山前解决。
tip.en: 📍 Basic facilities near summit viewpoint.

description.zh: 热门登山目的地，海拔336米，可远眺珠江口日落。
description.en: Popular hiking destination with 336m peak and stunning sunset views over the Pearl River Delta.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 蛇口看日落的天花板。360° 无遮挡：脚下蛇口片区、赤湾码头、深圳湾，远处香港流浮山和大屿山。从海上世界旁登山口上山约 50 分钟。
tip.en: 📍 Ultimate Shekou sunset spot. 360° view: Shekou, Chiwan Port, Bay, HK islands. ~50min from Sea World.

tip.zh: 📍 面向东北方向的半山观景点。登山约 40 分钟。需带手电筒（山路无路灯），山顶风大请带外套保暖。
tip.en: 📍 Mid-mountain viewpoint facing NE. ~40min. Bring flashlight — no lights before dawn.

tip.zh: 📍 从海上世界登山口到山顶约 4km 登山道，坡度较大。是深圳经典的越野跑训练路线之一。
tip.en: ~4km climb from Sea World to summit. Steep grade — classic Shenzhen trail run route.

tip.zh: 📍 海上世界综合体地下停车场，登山后可在周边用餐。收费停车场。
tip.en: 📍 Sea World underground parking. Paid. Good dining options after hike.

description.zh: 前海标志性公园，有著名的前海石。开阔海景，现代景观设计。
description.en: Landmark park in Qianhai with the famous Qianhai Stone. Open sea views and modern landscape.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 围绕「前海」石刻巨石的环形广场，面朝深圳湾大桥正西方向。落日余晖中大桥轮廓被金色光晕包裹。
tip.en: 📍 Circular plaza around engraved 'Qianhai' stone facing Bay Bridge due west.

tip.zh: 📍 沿前海湾新建的滨水绿道，连接桂湾公园和演艺公园。路面平整宽阔，适合公路车骑行。
tip.en: 📍 Brand-new waterfront greenway along Qianhai Bay connecting Guiwan & Performance Parks.

tip.zh: 📍 前海石东侧的亲水步道。笔直开阔，适合晨跑散步，可看前海中心区摩天楼群逐渐亮起灯光。
tip.en: 📍 Seaside promenade east of Qianhai Stone. Watch Qianhai Central District skyscrapers light up.

tip.zh: 📍 围绕前海石公园人工湖的环形跑道，约 1.5km。路面平整，夜景灯光一流。
tip.en: ~1.5km loop around artificial lake. Smooth surface, excellent night lighting.

tip.zh: 📍 公园地下停车场，收费。周末车位紧张。
tip.en: 📍 Underground paid parking. Limited on weekends.

tip.zh: 📍 广场西侧公共卫生间，设施新。
tip.en: 📍 West side of plaza. Modern facility.

description.zh: 现代公园，开阔草坪、海景和艺术装置。适合日落野餐和户外活动。
description.en: Modern park with open lawns, sea views, and art installations. Great for sunset picnics.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 公园中央的超大弧形草坪，面朝正西方向，铺野餐垫看日落的绝佳位置。周末常有人搭帐篷放风筝。建议下午 4 点到达占位。
tip.en: 📍 Large curved central lawn facing west — perfect picnic blanket sunset spot. Arrive ~4PM.

tip.zh: 📍 连接演艺公园和前海石公园的滨水骑行路段。沿港湾曲线延伸，玻璃幕墙建筑群+平静海面，全程约 5km。
tip.en: 📍 Waterfront cycling link between Performance Park & Qianhai Stone. ~5km harbor curve.

tip.zh: 📍 草坪北侧的小型儿童游乐区，有秋千、跷跷板和沙坑。周末家庭聚集地。
tip.en: 📍 Small kids zone north of the lawn with swings, seesaw, and sandbox.

tip.zh: 📍 公园东侧地面停车场，收费。
tip.en: 📍 East side surface parking. Paid.

description.zh: 南头片区社区公园，以荔枝林闻名，氛围宁静。适合晨练和家庭散步。
description.en: Neighborhood park in Nantou area known for lychee trees and peaceful atmosphere.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 被茂密荔枝林环绕的开放式健身广场。老南头街坊每天早上聚集在这里打太极、慢跑，夏天有树荫非常舒适。
tip.en: 📍 Open fitness plaza surrounded by lychee grove. Local Nantou residents' tai chi & jogging spot.

tip.zh: 📍 公园内部的短距离平坦步道，适合带小孩练习骑车和饭后散步。周末人少安静，荔枝林环绕环境清幽。
tip.en: 📍 Short flat internal path, great for kids learning to ride. Quiet even on weekends.

tip.zh: 📍 环绕健身广场的塑胶跑道，约 800m 一圈。树荫覆盖率高，夏天跑步也不晒。
tip.en: ~800m rubber track around fitness plaza. Heavy tree cover — shaded even in summer.

tip.zh: 📍 公园东北角的室外篮球场，免费开放。早晚时段常有人打球，光线一般。
tip.en: 📍 Outdoor basketball court at northeast corner. Free. Popular morning/evening slots.

tip.zh: 📍 健身广场旁边的小型儿童游乐设施，适合学龄前儿童。
tip.en: 📍 Small playground beside fitness plaza. For preschool-aged children.

tip.zh: 📍 公园外围道路路边停车位，免费但数量很少。
tip.en: 📍 Street parking around park perimeter. Free but very limited.

tip.zh: 📍 公园东门附近的公共厕所。
tip.en: 📍 Near east gate entrance.

description.zh: 以孙中山命名的历史公园，有孙中山铜像和花园。南山最老的公园。
description.en: Historic park named after Sun Yat-sen. The oldest park in Nanshan with mature trees.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 古树参天的广场，晨光穿过树叶打在铜像上很美。适合慢跑热身。
tip.en: Ancient tree canopy, morning light through leaves on the statue is beautiful. Good for warm-up jog.

tip.zh: 📍 绕公园人工湖的环形步道，约 2km。古树成荫，环境幽静。
tip.en: ~2km loop around the lake. Mature trees provide shade throughout.

tip.zh: 📍 公园内室外羽毛球场，免费使用，需自备球拍。早晨和傍晚人气高。
tip.en: 📍 Outdoor badminton courts. Free, bring your own equipment.

tip.zh: 📍 公园南侧小型儿童游乐区，有滑梯、秋千和转盘。
tip.en: 📍 South-side small kids area with slides, swings, and merry-go-round.

tip.zh: 📍 公园南门外地面停车场。
tip.en: 📍 Surface lot outside south gate.

tip.zh: 📍 公园管理处旁的公共厕所。
tip.en: 📍 Beside park management office.

description.zh: 生态旅游主题公园，有植物园、瀑布、蝴蝶馆和教育展览。
description.en: Eco-tourism theme park with botanical gardens, waterfalls, and butterfly house.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 开园时人最少，进入雨林迷宫和热带植物区。蒸汽缭绕、鸟鸣声声，像进入了另一个世界。需购票入内。
tip.en: 📍 Best at opening — rainforest maze entrance most atmospheric. Ticket required.

tip.zh: 📍 园内热门亲子项目，可以近距离观察各种蝴蝶。孩子们的最爱。包含在门票内。
tip.en: 📍 Popular family attraction — observe butterflies up close. Included with ticket.

tip.zh: 📍 景区门口停车场，收费。容量充足。
tip.en: 📍 Entrance parking lot. Paid. Adequate capacity.

tip.zh: 📍 游客服务中心内的公共卫生间，设施完善。
tip.en: 📍 Inside visitor service center. Well-equipped.

description.zh: 月牙形海湾公园，适合晨练和钓鱼。社区氛围宁静。
description.en: Crescent-shaped bay park, popular for morning exercises and fishing.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 本地钓友的日出据点。月牙形海湾遮挡光线，金光洒在水面的画面很美。适合带鱼竿和咖啡来发呆。
tip.en: 📍 Local anglers' sunrise spot. Crescent bay creates framed golden light on water.

tip.zh: 📍 连接蛇口片区的短距离亲水步道。路面较窄但风景好，适合休闲骑行和傍晚散步。月牙形海湾景色独特。
tip.en: 📍 Short waterfront path connecting to Shekou. Narrow but scenic, good for casual rides.

tip.zh: 📍 沿月牙形海湾的短距离步道，约 800m。安静祥和，适合独自冥想式跑步。
tip.en: ~800m crescent bay loop. Quiet and meditative running.

tip.zh: 📍 公园外围道路免费路边停车位。
tip.en: 📍 Free street parking along road outside park.

description.zh: 以明华轮为中心的海滨文化综合体，有公园、博物馆、国际美食。
description.en: Waterfront cultural complex centered around the Minghua cruise ship.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 明华轮（退役游轮）旁边的海滨栈道。船体剪影配上落日非常出片。看完日落可以直接去海上世界周边餐厅吃饭。
tip.en: 📍 Promenade beside Minghua (retired cruise ship). Ship silhouette + sunset is photogenic.

tip.zh: 📍 沿明华轮周边的海滨步道骑行。可以看到明华轮、渔港和远处香港的夜景。傍晚出发，夜骑体验一流。
tip.en: 📍 Waterside ride around Minghua Ship area. Views of ship, fishing port, and HK at night.

tip.zh: 📍 明华轮南侧的开放式儿童娱乐区，有小型的旋转木马和游乐设施。周末热闹非凡。
tip.en: 📍 South of Minghua — open kids zone with carousel and rides. Very lively on weekends.

tip.zh: 📍海上世界综合体大型地下停车场，收费但车位充裕。
tip.en: 📍 Large underground parking garage. Paid but ample spaces.

tip.zh: 📍 明华轮码头附近公共卫生间。
tip.en: 📍 Near Minghua pier.

description.zh: 城市保护湿地，有栈道、丰富鸟类和环保教育。需要预约入内。
description.en: Protected urban wetland with boardwalks, rich birdlife. Reservation required.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 从湿地生态展厅旁进入木栈道，穿梭在芦苇和红树林之间。清晨鸟类最活跃。需在「华侨城湿地公园」微信公众号预约入内。
tip.en: 📍 Wooden boardwalk from Eco Exhibition Hall through reeds & mangroves. WeChat reservation required.

tip.zh: 📍 围绕湿地的木栈道环路，约 3km。完全平坦，穿行芦苇荡中，非常宁静治愈。
tip.en: ~3km boardwalk loop around wetland. Completely flat, through reed beds. Peaceful and healing.

tip.zh: 📍 湿地公园不设专用停车场，最近的停车场在华侨城创意园内。步行约 8 分钟到达。
tip.en: 📍 No dedicated parking. Nearest is OCT Creative Park, ~8 min walk.

tip.zh: 📍 湿地生态展厅内的卫生间。
tip.en: 📍 Inside Eco Exhibition Hall.

description.zh: 以深圳人才为主题的现代湖滨公园，大草坪、音乐喷泉、跑道。
description.en: Modern lakeside park celebrating Shenzhen's talent. Open lawns and music fountain.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 面向前海天际线的湖畔亲水区域。落日映在湖面上，周末有音乐喷泉灯光秀。
tip.en: 📍 Lakeside platform facing Qianhai skyline. Sunset reflects on water. Weekend fountain shows.

tip.zh: 📍 专业跑道绕湖一圈约 2.5 公里。路面平整，晚上有灯光，夜骑也安全。
tip.en: 📍 Professional track ~2.5km lake loop. Lit at night, safe evening rides.

tip.zh: 📍 人才公园的标志性星光跑道，清晨湖面平静倒映前海天际线。跑步体验一流。
tip.en: 📍 Signature starlight running track. Calm morning lake reflects Qianhai skyline.

tip.zh: 📍 环湖塑胶跑道，全长 2.5km，是深圳跑友公认的优质跑步路线之一。
tip.en: 📍 2.5km rubber lake loop — one of Shenzhen's top-rated running routes.

tip.zh: 📍 湖畔大片开阔草坪，适合放风筝、踢球和野餐。周末家庭聚集地。
tip.en: 📍 Expansive lakeside lawn — kite flying, soccer, picnics. Family favorite on weekends.

tip.zh: 📍 公园北门地下停车场，收费。周末紧张。
tip.en: 📍 North gate underground parking. Paid, tight on weekends.

tip.zh: 📍 公园内服务站配套卫生间。
tip.en: 📍 At park service station.

description.zh: 南山最高峰（430米）的山野公园。原始登山步道穿越亚热带森林。
description.en: Nanshan's highest peak (430m). Pristine hiking through subtropical forest.

source.zh: 基于公园描述整理，非实时观测
source.en: Derived from park description, not live data

tip.zh: 📍 南山最高峰（430米）的「极目阁」观景台。360° 全景，日出云海翻涌非常壮观。登山约 1.5 小时（龙珠大道登山口），途经青云台。
tip.en: 📍 Nanshan's highest point (430m). 360° views, sea of clouds at sunrise. ~1.5h from Longzhu Ave.

tip.zh: 📍 不需登顶的日落好位置。约 30 分钟到达，面向西南方，适合体能一般的游客。可以看到深圳湾和前海的夜景亮灯过程。
tip.en: 📍 Great sunset view without summiting. ~30min from trailhead, facing SW.

tip.zh: 📍 经典越野跑训练线路，龙珠大道登山口至山顶约 6km，累计爬升 430m。路况原始，需越野跑经验。
tip.en: 📍 Classic trail run route. Longzhu trailhead to summit ~6km, 430m gain. Primitive terrain needs experience.

tip.zh: 📍 龙珠大道登山口旁免费路边停车区。空间有限，建议早到。
tip.en: 📍 Free roadside parking near Longzhu trailhead. Limited, arrive early.

tip.zh: 📍 半山观景台附近的简易洗手间。
tip.en: 📍 Basic restroom near mid-mountain viewpoint.
